name: SEA LIFE Sunshine Coast Aquarium
title: 30% off
subtitle: Enjoy 30% off
summary: 30% off a 1-DAY PURCHASE ADVANCE PERIOD for Weekdays*
merchant_editorial: Come on a journey of amazing discovery through SEA LIFE Sunshine Coast; a multi-award-winning, all-weather visitor attraction situated at The Wharf in Mooloolaba. Explore 11 fun and interactive animal zones across three levels, including Little Blue Penguins, Tidal Touch Pool, Seahorse Kingdom, Seal Island and the 80m Ocean Tunnel! With sea creatures of all shapes and sizes, from huge sharks to playful seals and our adorable little blue penguins, there's plenty of fun for everyone to enjoy! Get your hands wet at the Tidal Touchpool and discover our amazing marine animals before journeying to Seahorse Kingdom where you can be mesmerised by these wonders of nature. Explore our mysterious Coastal Wreck and learn about the many species that inhabit the coral reefs around Australia. Waddle into the world of penguins and be wowed by Sunshine Coast’s only colony of Little Blue Penguins as they march, dive, swim & play! Prepare for seal-iness as you swim over to Seal Island and take a close look at our playful seals and enjoy daily presentations! Marvel at the infinite colours, graceful motion, and ghost-like forms of the extraordinary squishy creatures at Jellyfish Kingdom. On your way out, explore the depths of the ocean as you walk beneath our 80-meter-long Ocean Tunnel. Encounter jaw-some sharks, rays, reef fish, and much more!

merchant_editorial:
Explore the wild side of the Cairns waterfront – hire a boat and journey into Trinity Inlet, with its mangrove forests, numerous tributaries, saltwater crocodiles and more. This fascinating marine ecosystem is fantastic for fishing and sightseeing, and you can do both on a Cairns boat hire with us.

Fishing – Trinity Inlet is a popular fishing spot for locals and is home to Barramundi, Mangrove Jack, Golden Snapper, Barred Grunter, Bream, Spotted Estuary Cod, Flathead and more. If you don’t have your own rods, no worries, you can hire those too – we also have bait, ice, eskys, BBQs and BBQ packs.

Sightseeing – This beautiful estuary has something for everyone. It’s so close to the city, but as you travel away from Marlin Marina and into its calm waters, you feel a world away. The backdrop is rainforest mountains, including the iconic Walshs Pyramid in Gordonvale, the soundtrack is your boat and the pops and clicks of the mangroves, and its thousands of tiny crabs.

Pontoon Boats & Tinnys – Cairns Boat Hire has a range of 8-person pontoon boats and 4-person tinny boats. All have canopy shade protection for your comfort. Private and commercial hire.

Explore 11 fun and interactive animal zones across three levels, including Little Blue Penguins, Tidal Touch Pool, Seahorse Kingdom, Seal Island and the 80m Ocean Tunnel! With sea creatures of all shapes and sizes, from huge sharks to playful seals and our adorable little blue penguins, there's plenty of fun for everyone to enjoy! Get your hands wet at the Tidal Touchpool and discover our amazing marine animals before journeying to Seahorse Kingdom where you can be mesmerised by these wonders of nature. Explore our mysterious Coastal Wreck and learn about the many species that inhabit the coral reefs around Australia. Waddle into the world of penguins and be wowed by Sunshine Coast’s only colony of Little Blue Penguins as they march, dive, swim & play! Prepare for seal-iness as you swim over to Seal Island and take a close look at our playful seals and enjoy daily presentations! Marvel at the infinite colours, graceful motion, and ghost-like forms of the extraordinary squishy creatures at Jellyfish Kingdom. On your way out, explore the depths of the ocean as you walk beneath our 80-meter-long Ocean Tunnel. Encounter jaw-some sharks, rays, reef fish, and much more!
